source: LVSlotPro ingest synthesis — AP + review docs in Slots/_ingest

machine.name: Coin Kingdom Aztec
machine.popularity_summary: Dual MHB Ainsworth; Aztec and Egyptian skins share identical ladder math.

guide_seed.title: Coin Kingdom Aztec
card_summary_bullets: Dual MHB: Major ~$1,000 (ceiling ~$990) and Grand $10,000 — jackpots only in Mystery Match 3.
Subtract ~2% RTP (Grand) / ~4% (Major) in MHB calc vs paytable; verify $2.85 Major meter seed.
Min bet, higher denom when you can; base game is brutal until a stacked feature pops.
guide_seed.card_ev_threshold: Major ~$955–968+ by RTP (94%→89%); Grand near ~$9,900+. Run MHB calc.

ap.volatility_summary: Very high base; ladder EV is predictable because Major/Grand tend to hit at ceiling — but bonus variance still swings sessions hard.
ap.popularity_summary: Common Ainsworth MHB pair on Vegas floors; Egyptian skin identical for AP.
edge_vectors: Major and Grand must-hit ladders with ceiling-style hits (especially Major ~$990).
Major meter runs ~3.5× Grand speed — combo-entry math for advanced plays.
Mystery Match-only jackpot path; predetermined picks.
Fake reel discs — ignore for timing; features are random.
ap.bankroll_angle: 300–500+ units at min qualifying bet; never max-bet a $1k MHB chase. Plan for dead base game and occasional 100×–200×+ features.
verification_checklist: Photo both MHB meters, denom, bet, paytable/RTP sticker.
Confirm not Class II non-MHB clone.
Spin enough coin-in to validate Major meter increment ($0.01 vs $0.02 tick).
common_pitfalls: Trusting the $3.00 Major meter display without true-up spins.
Chasing sliding disc animations as if they gate bonuses.
ap.nerf_angle: Nerf risk **Medium**: jurisdictional RTP bands and ladder packaging can differ; re-verify paytable and meter behavior same visit.
